message:
Add storage layer crate stubs: vfs, pager, wal, mvcc, btree

Five crates forming the storage engine layer, positioned between the
foundation types/error crates and the SQL processing layer above. Each
contains a Cargo.toml with correct workspace dependencies and a minimal
lib.rs stub ready for implementation.

fsqlite-vfs (Virtual Filesystem):
- Will provide the Vfs trait abstracting all OS file operations
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error
- Enables custom backends (memory, encryption, network)

fsqlite-pager (Page Cache & Journal):
- Will manage the page cache, rollback journal, and page-level I/O
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-vfs
- Central coordinator between VFS below and B-tree above

fsqlite-wal (Write-Ahead Logging):
- Will implement WAL mode with checkpoint management
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-vfs, fsqlite-pager
- Enables concurrent readers during writes

fsqlite-mvcc (Multi-Version Concurrency Control):
- Will provide page-level MVCC versioning — the key architectural
  innovation over stock SQLite, enabling truly concurrent writers
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-pager, fsqlite-wal, parking_lot
- Uses parking_lot for efficient reader-writer locks

fsqlite-btree (B-tree Storage Engine):
- Will implement B-tree and B+tree operations for tables and indexes
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-pager
- Handles cell parsing, page splitting, overflow chains, and cursor navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+[package]
+name = "fsqlite-btree"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "B-tree storage engine"
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-pager = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
